title: Awakening
overview: Yuta Hibiki wakes up in the home of his classmate, Rikka Takarada, with amnesia. A voice from an old computer, identifying himself as "Gridman," has a mission for him, but can he even survive the next day of school without his memories?

title: Restoration
overview: Yuta and his friends attempt to unravel the mystery of the city and everyone else's memories. However, more questions arise when a strange samurai arrives and tries to tamper with Gridman.

title: Defeat
overview: A new kaiju appears which poses a problem for Yuta and Gridman. As a result, Rikka and Utsumi are left wondering if their friend will end up long since dead, just like the other students.

title: Suspicion
overview: Rikka and Akane are invited on a group date, but the aftermath is disastrous. Will Yuta be able to convey his feelings for Rikka before it's too late?

title: Provocation
overview: A field trip takes the class away from the city for some summer fun, but when trouble occurs so far from home, there's no easy way to get to Junk.

title: Contact
overview: A few unexpected encounters leave Yuta and the others in shock. Except, Gridman being hunted down means Yuta is ever in danger.

title: Scheme
overview: The others are finding Yuta's story hard to believe. Nobody wants to confront and ask Akane, but in the meantime, Anti has made plans of his own.

title: Confrontation
overview: When the Tsutsujidai High School Festival is threatened, the Gridman Alliance must decide how to proceed. Some of them wonder if fighting is the only choice they have.

title: Dream
overview: Akane tries to win over the Gridman Alliance by lulling them into a dream. Will they remember each other and Gridman's calling or forever have sweet dreams?

title: Collapse
overview: Life goes on when there's a break in the kaiju attacks. However, when Akane's world comes crumbling down, the Gridman Alliance might need help to battle her broken heart.

title: Decisive Battle
overview: Disaster strikes on a morning like none other and it's hard to tell friend from foe. Akane seems to have all but given up, but Alexis has other plans in store.

title: Awakening
overview: It all comes down to the line as the Gridman Alliance attempts to save Akane, but do they have what it takes to battle the monster within?
